release.message:
EveLens 5.1.2 - Major Update Available
MAJOR FEATURES: • .NET 8 Migration - Modern framework with improved performance • New Installer - One-click with automatic .NET 8 download • Auto-Update System - Seamless background updates • Performance - 60%+ CPU reduction, handles 100+ characters • Loading Indicators - See API fetch progress • ESI Key Warnings - Visual alerts for expired tokens • Booster Simulation - Cerebral accelerator training times • Modern About Dialog - Dark/light theme toggle
BUG FIXES: • Settings not saving correctly - FIXED • Fork migration from other versions - FIXED • Certificate Browser removed (CCP deprecated) • 30+ character crash - FIXED • Structure lookup spam - FIXED
TECHNICAL: • JSON settings (auto-migrates from XML) • Per-character settings files • Version shown in window title
This is a recommended update for all users.

EveLens v5.1.1 - Important Update
FIXES: - Settings now save correctly between restarts - Certificate Browser deprecated - use Ship Browser for Masteries
This update fixes critical bugs. Please update.
